overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player follows other vehicles through urban streets, underpasses, and past various futuristic storefronts and billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with mixed storefronts and signage

events.description: white car passes on the left side at intersection
approaching covered underpass with blue lighting ahead

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets following a black sports car, navigating gentle curves

white car passing on the left side at the intersection

entered.detail: sleek black sports car with red taillights driving ahead of the player
large red neon cross sign mounted on building facade
illuminated digital advertisement screen above the street
row of shops with neon signage and glass windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy neon-lit city street at night, following a black sports car through moderate traffic. The player passes various commercial storefronts and a prominent red neon cross sign on the right, while a white car overtakes on the left. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful neon lights as the vehicle approaches a covered underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with industrial ventilation fans and blue neon lighting

events.description: entering underpass with distinct blue neon ambient lighting
passing large circular industrial ventilation fans mounted on left wall
exiting underpass back into open neon-lit street with natural rain visibility

agents.ego_description: driving through covered underpass with blue ambient lighting and industrial elements

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the overpass structure covering the roadway
large circular industrial ventilation fans with metal grating on the wall
thick concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
blue neon light strips illuminating the underpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass characterized by blue neon lighting and industrial architecture. Large circular ventilation fans are visible on the left wall as the car drives beneath the concrete overpass. The black sports car remains ahead until the exit, where the lighting transitions back to the open street's mixed neon ambiance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with pedestrians and ground-level shops

events.description: beginning to follow a pink sports car after the black car turns off
navigating through gentle turn with increased pedestrian presence on sidewalks
slowing for pedestrians crossing near commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: following a pink sports car through busy commercial streets with pedestrians carrying umbrellas

pedestrians with umbrellas walking along the sidewalk and crossing streets

entered.detail: bright pink sports car with distinctive taillights now leading the player vehicle
teal-colored wall with yellow graffiti art and street markings
ground-level shops with awnings and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the player begins following a pink sports car through a bustling commercial district. The street is lined with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, teal walls with graffiti, and various ground-level storefronts. The wet roads continue to reflect the vibrant neon signs as the vehicle navigates through moderate foot traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with central monument and digital billboards

events.description: approaching large open intersection with distinctive central monument structure
navigating around monument structure in roundabout-style intersection
making right turn onto narrower street with reduced traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through large intersection with monument and continuing through city streets

notable_agents.action: pink sports car continuing through intersection and turning onto narrower road

entered.detail: tall decorative monument structure standing in the center of the intersection
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a wide urban intersection dominated by a central monument structure. After navigating around the monument, the player follows the pink car through a right turn onto a narrower street lined with digital billboards and mixed-use buildings. The traffic remains light as the journey continues through the neon-lit cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with mixed residential buildings and sale signage

pink car slows and turns toward destination building

agents.ego_description: following pink car to final destination near building with prominent SALE signage

mixed-use buildings with residential windows above commercial spaces

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the pink sports car through narrower streets toward a destination marked by a prominent red neon SALE sign. The architecture shifts to mixed residential-commercial buildings with street vendors visible on the sidewalks. The pink car slows and turns toward the destination building as the player approaches the end of the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a rainy, neon-lit metropolis that transitions from open city streets through a subterranean underpass and back into a bustling commercial district. It begins by following a black sports car past colorful storefronts and a glowing red neon cross, with the wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant city lights. As the vehicle moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered underpass defined by industrial architecture and blue neon lighting, passing large circular ventilation fans along the concrete walls. The camera then emerges from the tunnel back into the open air, where the lighting returns to a mixed neon ambiance. Finally, the vehicle follows a pink sports car through a crowded street lined with graffiti-covered teal walls and pedestrians with umbrellas.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-lit metropolis that transitions from a wide, monumental intersection into a dense commercial district. It begins by navigating around a central monument structure at a broad urban crossing before following a pink sports car through a right turn onto a narrower street. As the vehicle progresses, the open intersection gives way to a corridor of digital billboards and mixed-use buildings under the glow of the cityscape. The scene then shifts toward a more intimate urban setting where street vendors line the sidewalks of residential-commercial blocks. Finally, the camera closes in as the pink car slows and turns toward a destination marked by a prominent red neon SALE sign.
